lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰਿ ਸਭਨਾ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲਿਆ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: sir sabhanaa samarath nadar nihaaliaa |17|
lines.english: You are the Almighty Overlord of all; You bless us with Your Glance of Grace. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਮਦ ਲੋਭ ਮੋਹ ਦੁਸਟ ਬਾਸਨਾ ਨਿਵਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh mad lobh moh dusatt baasanaa nivaar |
lines.english: Take away my sexual desire, anger, pride, greed, emotional attachment and evil desires.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਖਿ ਲੇਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਆਪਣੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: raakh lehu prabh aapane naanak sad balihaar |1|
lines.english: Protect me, O my God; Nanak is forever a sacrifice to You. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਾਂਦਿਆ ਖਾਂਦਿਆ ਮੁਹੁ ਘਠਾ ਪੈਨੰਦਿਆ ਸਭੁ ਅੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: khaandiaa khaandiaa muhu ghatthaa painandiaa sabh ang |
lines.english: By eating and eating, the mouth is worn out; by wearing clothes, the limbs grow weary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਤਿਨਾ ਦਾ ਜੀਵਿਆ ਜਿਨ ਸਚਿ ਨ ਲਗੋ ਰੰਗੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak dhrig tinaa daa jeeviaa jin sach na lago rang |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, cursed are the lives of those who are not attuned to the Love of the True Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਜਿਉ ਤੇਰਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਤਿਵੈ ਤਿਉ ਹੋਵਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: jiau jiau teraa hukam tivai tiau hovanaa |
lines.english: As is the Hukam of Your Command, so do things happen.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਜਹ ਰਖਹਿ ਆਪਿ ਤਹ ਜਾਇ ਖੜੋਵਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: jeh jeh rakheh aap teh jaae kharrovanaa |
lines.english: Wherever You keep me, there I go and stand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਤੇਰੈ ਕੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਧੋਵਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: naam terai kai rang duramat dhovanaa |
lines.english: With the Love of Your Name, I wash away my evil-mindedness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤੇਰੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੇ ਜੋਨਿ ਨ ਜੋਵਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo terai rang rate se jon na jovanaa |
lines.english: Those who are attuned to Your Love, shall not be trapped in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਜਪਿ ਤੁਧੁ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰ ਭਰਮੁ ਭਉ ਖੋਵਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: jap jap tudh nirankaar bharam bhau khovanaa |
lines.english: By continually meditating on You, O Formless Lord, my doubts and fears are dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑੀ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਤਿਨੑ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਰੋਵਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: jinaee pachhaataa hukam tina kade na rovanaa |
lines.english: Those who recognize the Lord's Command never weep.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਇਕੁ ਨੈਣ ਅਲੋਵਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: antar baahar ik nain alovanaa |
lines.english: Inwardly and outwardly, they behold the One Lord with their eyes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਉ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਖਸੀਸ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ਪਰੋਵਣਾ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: naau naanak bakhasees man maeh parovanaa |18|
lines.english: O Nanak, they are blessed with the gift of the Name, woven into the fabric of their minds. ||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਦਿਆ ਨ ਚੇਤਿਓ ਮੁਆ ਰਲੰਦੜੋ ਖਾਕ ॥
lines.translit: jeevadiaa na chetio muaa ralandarro khaak |
lines.english: Those who do not remember the Lord while they are alive, shall mix with the dust when they die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵੰਦਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਚੇਤਿਆ ਮਰੰਦਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: jeevandiaa har chetiaa marandiaa har rang |
lines.english: One who remembers the Lord while he is alive, shall be imbued with the Lord's Love when he dies.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦੁਨੀਆ ਸੰਗਿ ਗੁਦਾਰਿਆ ਸਾਕਤ ਮੂੜ ਨਪਾਕ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak duneea sang gudaariaa saakat moorr napaak |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the foolish and filthy faithless cynic passes his life engrossed in the world. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਤਾਰਿਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: janam padaarath taariaa naanak saadhoo sang |2|
lines.english: The precious gift of his life is redeemed, O Nanak, in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਜੁਗਾਦੀ ਆਪਿ ਰਖਣ ਵਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aad jugaadee aap rakhan vaaliaa |
lines.english: From the beginning, and through the ages, You have been our Protector and Preserver.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਣਾ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਹੋਇ ਘਟੇ ਘਟਿ ਸਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aoonaa kahee na hoe ghatte ghatt saariaa |
lines.english: You do not lack anything; You are filling each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾਰੁ ਸਚੁ ਪਸਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sach naam karataar sach pasaariaa |
lines.english: True is Your Name, O Creator Lord, and True is Your Creation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਹਰਵਾਨ ਸਮਰਥ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਘਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: miharavaan samarath aape hee ghaaliaa |
lines.english: You are merciful and all-powerful; You Yourself cause us to serve You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਰਚਨੁ ਰਚਾਇ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਪਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aape rachan rachaae aape hee paaliaa |
lines.english: Having created the creation, You Yourself cherish it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑ ਮਨਿ ਵੁਠਾ ਆਪਿ ਸੇ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jina man vutthaa aap se sadaa sukhaaliaa |
lines.english: Those whose minds in which You dwell are forever at peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਬੇਅੰਤ ਅਪਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh aape aap beant apaariaa |
lines.english: You Yourself are everything, O infinite, endless Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਕੀ ਟੇਕ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੰਮੑਾਲਿਆ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: gur poore kee ttek naanak samaaliaa |19|
lines.english: Nanak seeks the Protection and Support of the Perfect Guru. ||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਮਧਿ ਅਰੁ ਅੰਤਿ ਪਰਮੇਸਰਿ ਰਖਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aad madh ar ant paramesar rakhiaa |
lines.english: In the beginning, in the middle and in the end, the Transcendent Lord has saved me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਦਿਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਚਖਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: satigur ditaa har naam amrit chakhiaa |
lines.english: The True Guru has blessed me with the Lord's Name, and I have tasted the Ambrosial Nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਾ ਸੰਗੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਰਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: saadhaa sang apaar anadin har gun ravai |
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, I chant the Glorious Praises of the Lord, night and day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰਤੇ ਹਥਿ ਕਾਰਣੁ ਜੋ ਕਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh karate hath kaaran jo karai |
lines.english: Everything is in the Hands of the Creator; He does what is done.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਏ ਮਨੋਰਥ ਸਭਿ ਜੋਨੀ ਨਹ ਭਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: paae manorath sabh jonee neh bhavai |
lines.english: I have obtained all my objectives, and I shall not wander in reincarnation again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਇ ਜਿਨਿ ਉਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: tis no man vasaae jin upaaeaa |
lines.english: Enshrine Him in your mind, the One who created you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਜਨਿ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਖਸਮੁ ਤਿਨਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jin jan dhiaaeaa khasam tin sukh paaeaa |
lines.english: Whoever meditates on the Lord and Master obtains peace.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਮੰਗੈ ਦਾਨੁ ਸੰਤਾ ਧੂਰਿ ਤਰੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak mangai daan santaa dhoor tarai |1|
lines.english: Nanak begs for the gift of the dust of the feet of the Holy, which shall deliver him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਫਲੁ ਜਨਮੁ ਪਰਵਾਨੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: safal janam paravaan guramukh aaeaa |
lines.english: Fruitful is the birth, and approved is the coming of the Gurmukh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੈ ਬੁਝਿ ਨਿਹਾਲੁ ਖਸਮਿ ਫੁਰਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: hukamai bujh nihaal khasam furamaaeaa |
lines.english: One who realizes the Hukam of the Lord's Command shall be blessed - so has the Lord and Master ordained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਹੋਆ ਆਪਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲੁ ਸੁ ਨਹ ਭਰਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jis hoaa aap kripaal su neh bharamaaeaa |
lines.english: One who is blessed with the Lord's Mercy does not wander.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜੋ ਦਿਤਾ ਖਸਮਿ ਸੋਈ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jo jo ditaa khasam soee sukh paaeaa |
lines.english: Whatever the Lord and Master gives him, with that he is content.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸਹਿ ਭੁਲਾਏ ਆਪਿ ਮਰਿ ਮਰਿ ਜਮਹਿ ਨਿਤ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jiseh bhulaae aap mar mar jameh nit |2|
lines.english: But those whom the Lord Himself causes to wander, continue to die, and take reincarnation again. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਸਹਿ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਬੁਝਾਏ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਮਿਤ ॥
lines.translit: naanak jiseh deaal bujhaae hukam mit |
lines.english: O Nanak, one who is blessed with the kindness of the Lord, our Friend, realizes the Hukam of His Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਦਾਸ ਕਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਨ ਖਵਿ ਸਕਹਿ ਫੜਿ ਜੋਨੀ ਜੁਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: prabh daas kaa dukh na khav sakeh farr jonee jute |
lines.english: God will not endure the sufferings of His slaves, but catching the slanderers, He binds them to the cycle of reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿੰਦਕ ਮਾਰੇ ਤਤਕਾਲਿ ਖਿਨੁ ਟਿਕਣ ਨ ਦਿਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: nindak maare tatakaal khin ttikan na dite |
lines.english: The slanderers are destroyed in an instant; they are not spared for even a moment.
